ops.note: Swift DaemonKit core built (wf_2469ca95): WireEnvelope (golden-pinned v=1, sortedKeys), SocketServer (serial accept queue + self-pipe poll, chmod 0600, ping-then-unlink stale reclaim, sun_path length check, DispatchGroup drain), SnapshotWatcher (parent-dir vnode source, dual-ISO8601, 4 typed states), LoginItem.reconcile (status-machine behind SMAppService seam), RealHome (getpwuid), ReloadCoalescer (leading-edge, injected clock, no WidgetKit import). 26 tests + 1 regression = 27 green; swiftformat/swiftlint clean. One opus finding fixed: SnapshotWatcher fd leak on ARC-drop-without-stop → added deinit{stop()} + droppingAStartedWatcherReleasesItsDirectoryFD regression test. NOT yet committed (waiting for P2 Go workflow to clear the shared tree). PeerTrust/XPCTrust deferred to after the fable trust package.
